title: Lenovo India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Lenovo India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Lenovo India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Gurgaon operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Lenovo India:
Lenovo India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenovo India!
